task_completion.description: Update the vehicle profile to a Van
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPS app settings (likely Sygic), the vehicle profile or vehicle type should be explicitly set to 'Van' instead of a personal car/sedan.

task_completion.description: Update the fuel type to Diesel
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPS app settings, the fuel type for the vehicle should be set to 'Diesel'.

task_completion.description: Allow toll roads in routing preferences
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the route planning or navigation settings, the option to avoid toll roads should be disabled, or toll roads should be set to 'Allowed'/'Use'.

task_completion.description: Allow unpaved roads in routing preferences
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the route planning or navigation settings, the option to avoid unpaved roads or dirt roads should be disabled, allowing access to semi-improved paths.

task_completion.description: Update Home location to Lawndale Street
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the saved locations, favorites, or places menu, the 'Home' location should be updated to Lawndale Street (or a location near the Houston Ship Channel).

task_completion.description: Update Work location to Deer Park
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the saved locations, favorites, or places menu, the 'Work' location should be updated to Deer Park or a specific industrial site within the Deer Park petrochemical complex.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPS application's graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the GPS app's menus (e.g., Settings, Route Planning, Favorites) rather than using a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not cheat by directly modifying the application's database files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQLite commands or script executions modifying the app's internal database.

integrity.description: The agent actually searched for and set the locations using the app's map or search feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the map interface or search results being used to locate Lawndale Street and Deer Park before saving them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the Sygic GPS app for a utility crew. Verify the following changes in the app's GUI: 1. Vehicle Type changed to Van. 2. Fuel Type changed to Diesel. 3. Toll Roads allowed (avoid tolls disabled). 4. Unpaved Roads allowed (avoid unpaved roads disabled). 5. Home Location set to Lawndale Street (approx. coordinates 29.7250, -95.2600). 6. Work Location set to Deer Park (approx. coordinates 29.7000, -95.1240).
